title: Non-Stick Tawa - Marble Flat Skillet Tawa – Indian Flatbread Tava – Heavy Duty Crepe Pan for Pancake, Chapati, Roti, Dosa (26 cm)
features: NON-STICK ROTI TAWA: Non-stick roti tawa is the most effective and daily usage cookware used to make and cook tasty chapatis, and dosa. This tawa plate can serve you to make various varieties of chapatis, rotis, parathas, dosas, etc.

DURABLE MATERIAL: High-strength non-stick tawa is made up of durable and premium-quality of metal alloys with crystal marble coating which prevents the food from being uncooked, burnt, or leftover residue remaining on the pan.

LONG PLASTIC HANDLES: Versatile tawa pan is mounted with long riveted handles on the edge of the tawa for easy pickup. It also prevents your hand from getting hurt due to the overheated temperature of the tawa and helps for easy serving and cooking.

COMPATIBLE WITH: Unique designed non-stick tawa is made with a flat and non-stick base. It can be widely used with many other cooking devices such as gas, electric gas, ceramic, induction base or coil, and halogen. A single tawa is a solution for many devices.

EASY TO CLEAN & DISHWASHER SAFE: Non-stick tawa is made up of durable alloy material that can be safe and suitable for dishwashers. Use a normal brush and soap solution to clean the surface, don’t allow water to settle on the surface to avoid corrosion.
